scripts.test:smoke:search: set -a && . ./.env && set +a && k6 run --out json=results/results-search-smoke.json  scenarios/smoke/search.js
scripts.test:smoke:booking: set -a && . ./.env && set +a && k6 run --out json=results/results-booking.json        scenarios/smoke/booking.js
scripts.test:load:search: set -a && . ./.env && set +a && k6 run --out json=results/results-search-load.json   scenarios/load/search.js
scripts.test:load:search:json: set -a && . ./.env && set +a && k6 run --out json=results/results-search-load-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M).json scenarios/load/search.js
scripts.test:all: npm run test:smoke:search && npm run test:smoke:booking && npm run test:load:search
